zh.Blickling, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可布利可林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Boleyn於1350年4月30日出生在英國諾福爾可布利可林時，他的父親John Boleyn50歲，母親Margaret Boleyne46歲。他於1375年與Ann Jane Brachton在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1411年4月30日在英國諾福爾可薩勒享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可薩勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Boleyn于1350年4月30日出生在英国諾福爾可布利可林时，他的父亲John Boleyn50岁，母亲Margaret Boleyne46岁。他于1375年与Ann Jane Brachton在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1411年4月30日在英国諾福爾可薩勒享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可薩勒。

nameMeanings.name: Boleyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Bullen  .
Flemish: derivative of the personal name Bol, from Baldwin .

variants.name: Bullen
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from the French Channel port of Boulogne, recorded in Latin sources both as Gessoriacum and as Bononia. The latter name is clearly the source of the modern placename. It is ostensibly a derivative of Latin bonus ‘good’ (compare Bolognese ), but may in fact come from a Gaulish element bona ‘foundation’. Boulogne has long been a major trading port between England and France.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Boleyn was born on 30 April 1350, in Blickling, Norfolk, England, his father, John Boleyn, was 50 and his mother, Margaret Boleyne, was 46. He married Ann Jane Brachton in 1375, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 30 April 1411, in Salle, Norfolk, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Salle, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Boleyn est né le 30 avril 1350, à Blickling, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Boleyn, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margaret Boleyne, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Ann Jane Brachton en 1375, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 30 avril 1411, à Salle, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Salle, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Boleyn am 30. April 1350 in Blickling, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Boleyn 50 und seine Mutter Margaret Boleyne 46. Er hat 1375 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Ann Jane Brachton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 30. April 1411 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Salle, Norfolk, England und wurde in Salle, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Boleyn è nato il il 30 aprile 1350 nel Blickling, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Boleyn, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Boleyne, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Ann Jane Brachton nel 1375, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 30 aprile 1411, nel Salle, Norfolk, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Salle, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Boleynが1350年4月30日にイギリスノーフォルクブリックリングで生まれた時，父John Boleynは50歳，母Margaret Boleyneは46歳であった。1375年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでAnn Jane Brachtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1411年4月30日にイギリスノーフォルクサルで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Boleyn(이)가 1350년 4월 30일 영국 노르폴크 블릭링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Boleyn(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Boleyne(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Ann Jane Brachton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1411년 4월 30일 영국 노르폴크 샐일에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 샐일에 묻혔다.

pt.30 April 1350–30 April 1411: 30 de abril de 1350–30 de abril de 1411
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Boleyn nasceu em 30 de abril de 1350, em Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Boleyn, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Boleyne, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Jane Brachton em 1375, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 30 de abril de 1411, em Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Boleyn родился 30 апреля 1350 г. в местности бликклинг, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Boleyn было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Boleyne, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Jane Brachton в 1375 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 30 апреля 1411 г. в местности салл, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности салл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.30 April 1350–30 April 1411: 30 de abril de 1350–30 de abril de 1411
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Boleyn nació el 30 de abril de 1350, en Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Boleyn, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Margaret Boleyne, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Ann Jane Brachton en 1375, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 30 de abril de 1411, en Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
